## Constitution Compliance

Reference: `.specify/memory/constitution.md`

- [ ] I reviewed **I. Repository-Native Backbone** and confirmed durable changes remain repo-native or are documented as an approved exception.
- [ ] I reviewed **II. Git-First Change Control** and confirmed this change is reviewable, reversible, and traceable through Git.
- [ ] I reviewed **III. Markdown-First Curated Knowledge** and confirmed knowledge changes preserve structured Markdown, provenance, and curation boundaries.
- [ ] I reviewed **IV. Governed Voice-to-Action** and confirmed no free-form voice-to-shell path was introduced.
- [ ] I reviewed **V. Policy-Gated Execution and Audit** and confirmed command, policy, and audit expectations are updated together where applicable.
- [ ] I reviewed **VI. Spec-Driven Incremental Evolution** and confirmed this PR stays within one spec cycle or documents why it does not.
- [ ] I reviewed **VII. AI Agent Authorization and Oversight** and confirmed any agent-facing execution paths enforce declared scopes and human-approved review.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests or validation commands were run
- [ ] Any required exceptions were recorded in `policies/exceptions/`
